summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of theFRIEND emotional wellness app for kids. All core features tested and working perfectly including registration, daily check-ins with streak system, good deeds, emotional analysis, and avatar customization.
passed_tests: User registration flow with name, age, gender, email validation
Home dashboard displaying user name and streak badge correctly
Daily check-in flow with mood selection and questions (bothered/sad)
Streak count increases after successful check-in
Good Deeds tab navigation and activity completion with celebration modal
Feelings tab showing emotional analysis dashboard with scores and trends
Profile/Me tab with avatar customization (face, hair, clothes)
All bottom navigation tabs working correctly
Backend API endpoints (15/15 passed - 100% success rate)
Supportive messages and content loading properly
Confetti animations and UI feedback working
